name: a11y-snapshot-extension
description: Chrome extension to capture full-page accessibility snapshots including iframes

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:ts && npm run build:copy
scripts.build:copy: cp src/popup.html dist/ && cp src/popup.css dist/ && cp src/manifest.json dist/ && cp -r src/icons dist/
scripts.dev: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run watch
